# MathPulse AI

> AI-powered mathematics tutoring platform for Filipino senior high school STEM students (Grade 11–12), their teachers, and administrators. Powered by DeepSeek, Firebase, and FastAPI.

## Overview

MathPulse AI delivers personalized math learning through:
- AI chat tutor (DeepSeek) for on-demand math help
- Diagnostic assessments and adaptive learning paths
- Interactive lessons across Algebra, Geometry, Calculus, Trigonometry, Statistics
- Gamification with XP, streaks, achievements, and leaderboards
- Teacher dashboards with risk classification and class analytics
- Admin tools for user management, content, and system configuration

## Primary entry points

- [Home](/) — Landing and login
- [Student dashboard](/student) — Lessons, quizzes, AI tutor, progress
- [Teacher dashboard](/teacher) — Class analytics, topic mastery, data import
- [Admin dashboard](/admin) — User management, content, system settings

## Public documentation

- [README](https://github.com/Deign86/MATHPULSE-AI/blob/main/README.md) — Project overview, setup, architecture
- [API Reference](https://deign86-mathpulse-api-v3test.hf.space/docs) — Interactive Swagger UI for the FastAPI backend

## Authentication

Authenticated routes (`/student`, `/teacher`, `/admin`, `/api/*`) require Firebase Auth credentials and are not crawlable. Public landing content is at `/`.

## Tech stack

- Frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4
- Backend: FastAPI, Python 3.10+, DeepSeek API
- Infra: Firebase Auth, Firestore, Cloud Functions, Hugging Face Spaces

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/Deign86/MATHPULSE-AI
- Issues: https://github.com/Deign86/MATHPULSE-AI/issues
